coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 42-node root closure.
validation: Six Blender/VM cases cover authored diameter, alternate diameter, endpoint placement, cutter mode, round-square profile, and cutter offset. Every case has exact vertex and face counts plus matching four-decimal local bounds.

material.name: proc_ mahogany.003
material.contract: black HSV base + NodeGroup.015 roughness + Generated Mapping + distorted X-band Wave + derivative Bump + transmission/coat
material.residual: Eevee and WebGL distribute the very dark studio-environment coat and bump reflections differently; renderer identity is not claimed.
